message:
test(proptest): add 35 property tests for policy_metrics types and collector invariants

Covers serde roundtrips for all 8 serializable types (MetricSample, MetricUnit,
HealthStatus, HealthIndicator, SubsystemMetricSummary, PolicyMetricsCounters,
PolicyMetricsThresholds, PolicyMetricsDashboard), MetricTimeSeries circular buffer
invariants (capacity, eviction, min/avg/max ordering, range queries), and
PolicyMetricsCollector behavioral properties (counter aggregation, worst-of-indicators
health, threshold boundary conditions, kill-switch/chain-integrity overrides,
denial rate/quarantine sampling accuracy, snapshot monotonicity).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
